# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  rules:
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: default
      namespace: default
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-tap
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-identity
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-jaeger
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-prometheus
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-grafana
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-web
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-tap
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-identity
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-jaeger
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-prometheus
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-grafana
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-web
      namespace: linkerd
  - from:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: default
      namespace: default
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-tap
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-identity
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-jaeger
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-prometheus
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-grafana
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-web
      namespace: linkerd

    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: default
      namespace: default

      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-proxy-injector
      namespace: linkerd

      namespace: linkerd

      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-prometheus
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-grafana
      namespace: linkerd

      name: linkerd-web
